description_long: This object consists of two small, vividly colored birds standing side by side. One bird is predominantly green with a red beak and black legs, while the other is purple with a similar red beak and black legs. Both birds have long, slender tails and smooth, unpatterned plumage, giving them a streamlined appearance. Their eyes are small and round, and their beaks are short and slightly curved, typical of parakeet-like birds. The feet are detailed with three forward-facing toes and one backward-facing toe, all ending in sharp claws. The overall form is compact and lifelike, with a focus on bold, solid coloration and simple anatomical features.
description: A pair of small, vividly colored birds—one green and one purple—with long tails, red beaks, and black legs, standing side by side.
description_view_0: Front view showing both birds facing forward, highlighting their red beaks, round eyes, and black feet.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the profile of both birds, emphasizing their long tails, smooth bodies, and the color contrast between green and purple.
description_view_2: Top view revealing the solid, unpatterned plumage and the full length of their pointed tails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1 but with the green bird in the foreground and the purple bird behind.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid color with no visible pattern
